label: 1580 CE
era_summary: 1580 (MDLXXX) was a leap year starting on Friday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1580 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1580: Netherlands-Spain, 1566-1609; Turkey-Spain, 1569-80; Portugal-Malabar, 1575-85. Maddison records GDP/capita 1446 (ESP, 1580) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

francia.summary: Active conflicts in 1580: Netherlands-Spain, 1566-1609; Spain-Netherlands (with intervention from France and England), 1578-1587; France (Huguenots), 1580.
